title: Valuate the traditional chestnuts production
author: Almeida, César
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Improve the chestnut mechanical harvesting process, the preservation of nut quality between harvest and consumer, by developing a new disinfestation method and creating a protocol for an efficient fungal control during the chestnut storage at room temperature.
steps_raw: Improve the chestnut mechanical harvesting process, the preservation of nut quality between harvest and consumer, by developing a new disinfestation method and creating a protocol for an efficient fungal control during the chestnut storage at room temperature.
